summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Birth Plan feature with all 9 sections. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Birth plan screen, section modals, and form fields all working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web Pressable components don't respond to Playwright clicks - known limitation from iteration 1. JavaScript click workaround works for navigation testing.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - minor deprecation warning from React Native Web

critical_code_review_comments: Birth plan implementation complete with all 9 sections as specified
SECTION_FORMS configuration correctly defines all field types (text, textarea, multiselect, singleselect)
Section status correctly updates from 'Not started' to 'Complete' when data is saved
Completion percentage calculates correctly (9 sections = ~11.11% per section)
Export endpoint returns plan with user metadata (name, due date, birth setting)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All visual/section modal tests pass, button click automation has Playwright limitation

seed_data_creation: All 9 birth plan sections populated via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Birth plan feature fully tested and working. All 9 sections (about_me, labor_delivery, pain_management, monitoring_iv, induction_interventions, pushing_safe_word, post_delivery, newborn_care, other_considerations) are implemented with correct form fields. Section modals open on click with proper form fields. Data persists correctly. Export endpoint returns birth plan data. To test frontend with Playwright, use localStorage.setItem('session_token', TOKEN) instead of cookies since app uses AsyncStorage.

Section Modal Forms.pushing_safe_word: 6 fields - includes text input for safe word working
Section Modal Forms.all_sections: Form fields render correctly with saved data
